With our location right between all major cities, Gouda is perfectly positioned to attract talent from across the Randstad. Therefore, we will create space for businesses.

114785.explanation: Volt believes that small business owners should decide for themselves where and when they want to operate. Sunday is a day many people have off and really appreciate being able to do their shopping or visit shops. For Volt, there is no taboo here; it is, after all, a free choice to be open.

114786.explanation: Volt believes all municipalities should fairly contribute to housing urgent housing seekers. Status holders without housing must also be able to start building a life in the Netherlands. In this way, asylum seeker centers are also relieved.

114788.explanation: Volt embraces the energy transition and the use of clean energy. Solar panels are crucial to this. Volt prefers fitting solar panels on the roofs of commercial real estate, housing corporations, and government buildings rather than on agricultural land. This issue belongs to provincial policy.

114790.explanation: This community center already exists. Foundation 't Govertje has a prominent location and plays an important role in Goverwelle. Volt’s ambition is to create a House of the Neighborhood in every Gouda district. These are places where administrative services, aid services, and visible enforcement come together.

114792.explanation: Currently, four coffeeshops are permitted in Gouda. That number seems sufficient for the demand. All coffeeshops are concentrated in the city center, and regarding safety enforcement, Volt considers this also a sufficient number. Volt will continue talks with the coffeeshop owners.

114797.explanation: Volt wants to promote sustainable mobility and reduce car dependency. Public space is scarce; there is not enough room to park all residents’ and visitors’ cars in the city center. We are working on an ambitious future vision in which each mode of transportation has its own place.

114798.explanation: We turn residential yards into low-traffic areas to increase safety, improve community spirit, and give our children more space to play outside. Volt always prioritizes this. Space for playing, meeting, and safety over accessibility by car.

114799.explanation: Our ambition is to gradually grow towards a low-traffic center by encouraging alternative modes of transport and redesigning public space. We follow successful models from several European cities such as Delft, Leiden, or Strasbourg (which did this 20 years ago).

114800.explanation: Volt wants to transform nuisance-causing industries within residential areas so they fit a circular and emission-free economy, and if that is not possible, have them move out of the center.

114801.explanation: In spring 2026, the road will undergo major reconstruction to be designed as a 30 km/h road. With this new design and the lower speed limit, the municipality expects trucks to choose alternative routes.

114803.explanation: It would be wonderful if all the bridges were restored in the city center, but it costs far too much money, the bridges are too low and too old to simply be changed, and besides, only small boats could use them. It's a pity, but sometimes you have to make choices.

statements.title: The municipality must ensure that the Cargill factory moves out of the city center.
The residents of Gouda should be able to express their opinion on important issues via a referendum.

titleParts.text: De inwoners van Gouda moeten over belangrijke onderwerpen hun mening kunnen geven via een

titleParts.glossary: A public consultation where residents can express their opinion on a political issue. The municipal council is not obliged to follow the result; legally it cannot.

statements.title: The municipality should support the local broadcaster with additional funding.

titleParts.glossary: Radio and television by and for people from the municipality and the immediate area.

statements.title: Cafés and restaurants must be able to determine their own opening hours.
The municipality should organize a fireworks show on New Year's Eve.
There should be fewer parking spaces in the neighborhoods.
The asylum reception center in our municipality should be closed as soon as possible.

titleParts.glossary: A place where people who have applied for asylum are accommodated. An asylum shelter can be temporary. A permanent asylum shelter is called an asylum seekers' centre (azc).

titleParts.text: in onze gemeente moet zo snel mogelijk sluiten.

statements.title: Anyone who buys a home in our municipality must live in it themselves.
People who need care should always be able to choose a care provider that matches their religion, culture, or beliefs.

titleParts.text: Mensen die zorg nodig hebben moeten altijd kunnen kiezen voor een zorgverlener die past bij hun geloof, cultuur of

titleParts.glossary: What someone believes about life, such as a religion or personal conviction.

statements.title: Every primary school child should be able to receive music lessons subsidized by the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Money the government gives to citizens, businesses, and organizations to support them.

titleParts.text: van de gemeente muziekles kunnen krijgen.

statements.title: The municipality must allow fewer Sunday shopping days.
Trucks should be prohibited on the Koningin Wilhelminaweg.
There should be more camera surveillance in Gouda.

titleParts.glossary: Monitoring of a building, area, or (groups of) people using security cameras.

statements.title: The municipality should raise the income threshold for receiving poverty assistance.
The municipal enforcement officers (BOAs) who monitor safety in Gouda should be equipped with batons.

titleParts.glossary: Special Enforcement Officers. They can issue fines and often supervise the streets.

titleParts.text: die in Gouda controleren op veiligheid moeten een wapenstok krijgen.

statements.title: The maximum speed limit in built-up areas should be set to 30 km/h.

titleParts.glossary: The maximum speed that cars and motorcycles are allowed to drive on the road.
An area with buildings (houses, other structures).

statements.title: When allocating social housing, applicants from the municipality should be given priority.

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

titleParts.text: moeten woningzoekenden uit de eigen gemeente voorrang krijgen.

statements.title: The municipality should distribute tampons and sanitary pads for free.
People receiving social assistance should, in return, do socially useful work.

titleParts.glossary: Money from the municipality for people who have no income or personal funds.
For example cleaning the streets or keeping company and supporting elderly residents.

statements.title: The municipality must continue to give refugees with a residence permit priority for social housing.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet vluchtelingen met een

titleParts.glossary: The right to reside in the Netherlands. The term can refer to the right itself or to the card that shows someone has that right.
A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

statements.title: When selecting organizations for youth care, the municipality should primarily pay attention to price.
Gouda should build a new community center in the Goverwelle district.
The property tax (onroerendezaakbelasting, OZB) should be reduced.

titleParts.glossary: Tax you pay as the owner of a building or piece of land, or as the user of a commercial property.
Property tax. Tax you pay as the owner of a building or piece of land, or as the user of a commercial property.

statements.title: The municipality should allow the establishment of new coffeeshops.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet de vestiging van nieuwe

titleParts.glossary: Shops or cafés where you can buy and smoke soft drugs (hash, weed).

statements.title: There should be more business parks in Gouda.
Gouda's city center should become car-free.
The municipality should abolish the dog tax.

titleParts.glossary: Tax paid to the municipality for owning one or more dogs.

statements.title: The municipality must allow solar panels on agricultural land.
Paid parking in the center should be made cheaper.
The municipality should ensure that boats can pass under the bridges in the city center.
